title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amazon India Digital Technologies:
Amazon India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
